text:
is a plastic model kit series from . The plastic model is a partially painted assembly kit. With color-coded runner parts and pre-painted parts, to recreate the mecha design of the robot by just by assembling it. The main materials used are hard plastics such as PS and ABS, and they can also be modified and painted. This model kit is suitable for both figure fans who enjoy the style and gimmicks and model fans who like to build detailed models.
